mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mock_portfolio(user_seq, stock_seq, quantity, avg_price) VALUES (#{userSeq}, #{stockSeq}, #{tradeQuantity}, #{tradePrice}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE avg_price = (avg_price * quantity + #{tradePrice} * #{tradeQuantity}) / (quantity + #{tradeQuantity}), quantity = quantity + #{tradeQuantity}
INSERT INTO mock_trade(user_seq, stock_seq, trade_type, trade_price, trade_quantity) VALUES (#{userSeq}, #{stockSeq}, #{tradeType}, #{tradePrice}, #{tradeQuantity})
